Slide templates · v2

Sales-deck system, on tone of voice v1.

Eight on-voice templates at 1920×1080. Inter Tight + JetBrains Mono. Stock iconography removed; the worm boundary metaphor and typography do the visual work.

  • Cover01
    Display headline · accent line · sober credit row.
  • Section divider02
    Oversized numeral, blue rule, part heading.
  • Own / Operate / Govern03
    Glyph-led tile system. No stock icons.
  • Stats band04
    Four big numerals, footnoted sources.
  • Boundary diagram05
    Worm metaphor — green inside, red outside.
  • Comparison · light06
    Light-mode 3-column table — challenge / opportunity / answer.
  • Big quote07
    Display face, attribution row.
  • Next steps08
    Numbered list with deep-dive panel.
